description: The x-axis labels on this chart are completely illegible due to severe overlapping - the full quarter names like "First Quarter of 2023" and "Second Quarter of 2023" are printed horizontally without any rotation, causing them to overlap into an unreadable mess. Additionally, the x-axis title "Quarter" is pushed up into the tick labels, creating another layer of text collision that makes it impossible to read any of the temporal information clearly.
